query: optional repository dashboard chat runtime query

results.title: Phase 5 dashboard local runtime chat shell
results.content: Added a first dashboard chat slice backed by a real admin runtime query endpoint. Introduced src/minder/presentation/http/admin/runtime.py with /api/v1/runtime/query wrapping QueryTools.minder_query for managed repositories, added a new /dashboard/chat page with RuntimeChatShell and runtime-chat-page.ts, extended the dashboard nav and admin API client, and updated Phase 5 progress docs to mark dashboard local chat in progress. Verified with uv run pytest tests/unit/test_api_runtime.py -q (1 passed), bun run check (0 errors, 1 existing Card.astro hint), and bun run build in src/dashboard.

results.title: Dashboard runtime chat streaming
results.content: Implemented incremental dashboard chat streaming for local runtime queries. Added stream_generate support to local/openai LLM clients and LLMNode, added MinderGraph.stream and QueryTools.minder_query_stream, exposed POST /api/v1/runtime/query/stream as NDJSON from admin runtime routes, and updated runtime-chat-page.ts plus admin API helpers to append assistant text live while chunks arrive. Verified with uv run pytest tests/unit/test_api_runtime.py tests/unit/test_runtime_detection.py -q (14 passed), bun run check, and bun run build.

results.title: Dashboard chat prompt-echo cleanup
results.content: Sanitized admin runtime answers when prompt markers like Instruction envelope leak from model output, and refactored dashboard chat into a threaded conversation shell with side insights instead of a raw debug panel. Files: src/minder/presentation/http/admin/runtime.py, src/dashboard/src/components/RuntimeChatShell.astro, src/dashboard/src/scripts/runtime-chat-page.ts, src/dashboard/src/styles/global.css.

results.title: Live chats me controller clean-architecture refactor
results.content: Moved authenticated user live chats listing from LiveChatsController to presentation/live-chat-user.controller.ts with GET companies/:companyId/live-chats/me. Refactored GetMyLiveChatsUseCase and ILiveChatUserRepository to use application-layer response types plus tenant-aware input { companyId, externalIds[] } so repository filters by liveChat.companyId and auth user identifiers instead of presentation DTO coupling. Updated live-chats.module.ts to register LiveChatUserController.

results.title: Live chats me uses shared PageResponseDto
results.content: Updated live-chats/me response mapping to extend shared PageResponseDto. FindLiveChatUsersByExternalIdResult now carries skip and take from repository normalization, LiveChatUserMapper includes those pagination fields, and GetMyLiveChatsResponseDto maps result.items to data with total/skip/take/hasMore so the API matches the common paginated response contract.
